title.en: The True River Sword Ancestor spoke.

content.en:
"I know another use for the Primordial Tree!"

The True River Sword Ancestor spoke.

As soon as the words fell, Ye Tian and the other supreme beings were attracted by the True River Sword Ancestor and waited for the True River Sword Ancestor to explain.

True River Sword Ancestor said: "The primordial leaf can bring people into the primordial sea, but in fact, the primordial leaf was born in the primordial tree, and the primordial tree was born in the primordial sea, as for how the primordial leaf came out of the primordial sea in the first place, let's just think of it as an eternal realm, let's not mention this." But the Primordial Tree will still be discovered, and after many battles and snatches, our Origin God Pavilion also snatched a Primordial Tree at the beginning, and after our research, we found that the Primordial Tree Tree Heart can be used to refine a special clone, and even the half-step Eternal Realm is useful. In other words, if you obtain the Primordial Tree Heart, you can refine it into a half-step Eternal Realm clone, and the Primordial Tree Heart exists in the body, even if the doppelganger falls, it can be condensed again at some cost. For the Supreme or the Half-Step Eternal Realm who did not have the ability of a doppelganger, the value of the Primordial Tree Heart was very high. But as far as I know, the Primordial Tree Heart is useless to the Eternal Realm, otherwise the Primordial Tree would have been taken away by the Eternal Realm long ago and would not have been left to us. "

"Condense the clones!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

This ability is very powerful, and for a supreme person who does not have the ability of a doppelganger, this is simply a supreme treasure.

Although he has a replica body, he doesn't need the heart of the primordial tree, but his family needs it!

They don't have the ability to clone themselves, so they don't dare to rush into it, otherwise if they accidentally fall, they will really fall, but if they have the heart of the primordial tree and can refine the clone, then there is no need to be afraid.

Knowing this usefulness, Ye Tian was overjoyed in his heart, but he didn't show it.

Subsequently, he remained silent.

After that, everyone exchanged information, and the Twelve Ancestors also announced the opening date of a treasure land, but this treasure land is not of high value, and it is suitable for the seven or eight supreme people to enter, but the harvest will not be very large.

Ye Tian had no interest in such a treasure land, so he was not ready to participate.

Soon.

At the end of the meeting, the Supreme Beings departed one by one.

When all the members of the inner circle left, the twelve ancestors began to discuss again.

"The Endless Ancestor suddenly asked the Primordial Tree, do you think he has obtained the Primordial Tree?"

Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor asked.

The True River Sword Ancestor said, "Most of the time it is possible that the Primordial Tree was found in the Primordial Sea and brought out. If that's the case......"

"True River Sword Ancestor, don't fight this idea, the Endless Ancestor has the ability of a clone, as for the potential, you are also very clear, there is even hope to surpass us in the future, even if he can't enter the Eternal Realm, but his combat power is too strong, and he is even expected to be invincible in the half-step Eternal Realm, such a person can't be an enemy. One of the Twelve Ancestors, the Black and White Source Ancestor, reminded.

"Hahahaha!!" True River Sword Ancestor laughed a few times and said, "You guys underestimate me too much, I won't snatch the Primordial Tree of the Endless Ancestor, I really don't have the ability to clone, but at my level, I am working hard to impact the Eternal Realm, and the clone just gives me one more life-saving ability, which is not of much use to cultivation." Moreover, when it comes to the Eternal Realm, the Primordial Tree is useless, and I can't even look down on the Eternal Realm, my vision is not so low, if it is a treasure that can make the Eternal Realm condense the clone, I will be moved. "

"It's just that although we won't be moved, it's hard to guarantee that other Supreme Beings or the Half-Step Eternal Realm won't be moved. Perhaps, they will not do it themselves, but they can invite other strong people to do it. Although the Endless Ancestor was very powerful, after all, his cultivation had just broken through to the Sevenfold Supreme, and his combat power was comparable to that of the ordinary Ninefold Supreme. If multiple top-notch Ninefold Beings or a half-step Eternal Realm were dispatched, the Endless Ancestor would be in trouble. "

"Shall we help, then?"

"I don't think other Supreme Beings or Half-Step Eternal Realms would try to kill the Endless Ancestor even if they made a move, because the Endless Ancestor had the ability to clone himself, and no one knew where the body was hiding, and it was almost impossible to kill. But the identity of the Endless Ancestor has been investigated, and the Supreme One of the Dark Forbidden Realm of the New Eternal Heaven and Earth has been born. If the enemy threatens the Endless Ancestor with the Dark Forbidden Domain, perhaps the Endless Ancestor will hand over the Primordial Tree. "

"Yes, as long as it doesn't endanger our lives, we don't interfere, otherwise wouldn't we become thugs?"

After the Twelve Ancestors discussed it like this, they felt that the Endless Ancestor might not be able to keep the Primordial Tree.

Of course, there is also a situation, that is, the Endless Ancestors really don't have the Primordial Tree, and they think too much.

......

Dark Forbidden Realm.

Ye Tian's replica body returned here.

"It's still getting their attention!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It couldn't be helped, he asked the question, it was already very strange, and it was normal to get their attention.

After all, the Supreme and the Half-Step Eternal Realm are not stupid, and with a little imagination, you can guess some.

However, he was not afraid, otherwise he would not have asked.

With his current strength, even if it was a powerful half-step Eternal Realm, he would not be afraid of anything.

The Dark Forbidden Domain is still under protection, and when the protection of the Dark Forbidden Domain ends, his cultivation will inevitably be able to be promoted to the realm of the Eightfold Supreme or even the Ninefold Superior.

At that time, he was not afraid of those top-notch half-step Eternal Realms at all.

Whoever is against him is a plague to his enemies, not to him.

Meanwhile.

Somewhere in the source sea, several Supreme Beings were discussing how to deal with Ye Tian, and they were drawing up a plan.

--------------------

In a dark hall, six Ninefold Supreme Beings were shrouded in darkness.

"According to my information, the Infinite Ancestor of the Sevenfold Supreme should have obtained the Primordial Tree in the Primordial Sea, and the Primordial Tree not only has the Primordial Leaves, but its heart can also help us condense our clones. "

"Even if we can only condense one of our clones, it's enough, the excess primordial leaves can be sold, enough in exchange for resources that allow us to impact the half-step Eternal Realm, and after condensing the clones, I shoot that person to break into the primordial sea, and he is not even afraid of falling. At that point, we will rise!"

"Remember, the Endless Ancestor has the power of a clone, and it is difficult to kill him completely, but his Dark Forbidden Realm cannot run there. "

"The Endless Ancestor is very young, he must have feelings for the race, and his family is still in the Dark Forbidden Domain, we surround the Dark Forbidden Domain and threaten him, otherwise, when the protection period of the Dark Forbidden Domain passes, the Dark Forbidden Domain will be completely destroyed, and the Endless Ancestor may directly hand over the Primordial Tree. "

"Then let's do it, I can't go, the Endless Ancestor will recognize me, and I'll leave it to you!"

After the six Ninefold Supreme Beings deliberated, they immediately prepared to act.

Otherwise, if you move slowly, you will be preempted by other strong people, and maybe it won't be their turn.
